title: eruca tanacetifolia
intro: Eruca tanacetifolia, also known as rocket or garden rocket, is an annual plant belonging to the Brassica family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and used as a leafy green vegetable in salads and cooking. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and polyphenols. The health benefits of Eruca tanacetifolia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams to support overall health and well-being.
